signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical Shock + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 157.14 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid despite reports of Iranian drone attacks on a UAE tanker and missile strikes on a US warship near Jask Island. JPY COT LF net short -88,543 (30.6% long) remains a crowded carry trade. While VIX at 18.2 indicates normal volatility, the escalation in the Strait of Hormuz introduces acute intervention risk on any spike toward 160.00. Carry dominance persists unless VIX exceeds 25, triggering a broad deleveraging of JPY shorts.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Retail Divergence
signals.text: AUD/USD at 0.7183 — COT LF net long +48,299 (74.8% long) vs retail 89% short creates a sharp institutional vs retail divergence. Retail is aggressively fading the institutional long trend. With the RBA meeting on 5 May, the 35bp AUD carry premium over the Fed is the primary structural support. Retail capitulation risk is elevated if price extends higher, though the bull steepener regime (+49.8bp 2s10s) suggests late-cycle caution.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Correlation Break + Macro Mix
signals.text: EUR/USD at 1.1701 — Correlation with EuroStoxx 50 at +0.726 vs norm of -0.142 (z=+1.90σ) signals a regime break where EUR is trading as a pure risk proxy rather than a funding currency. ECB Survey of Professional Forecasters showing higher inflation and weaker growth confirms a worsening macro mix. Fed 3.75% vs ECB 2.0% (+175bp spread) favors USD, keeping upside structurally limited as energy shocks weigh on the Eurozone outlook.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence
signals.text: NZD/USD at 0.5887 — COT LF net short -16,833 (23.0% long) shows speculators are fading the RBNZ's hawkish bias. With the RBNZ on hold at 2.25% but maintaining a hike bias for the next meeting on 27 May, a short-squeeze risk is present if data supports the tightening path. However, the 150bp carry disadvantage vs the Fed (3.75%) provides a persistent ceiling. Watch for LF delta turning positive to confirm a shift in spec conviction.
